column1: # Source: ISO 22301:2019 correspondence tables + ISO 27002:2022 guidance on A.5.29/A.5.30.

column9: rationale
Context of the organization — identical Annex SL clause.
Interested parties — Annex SL harmonised.
Scope of the BCMS — Annex SL harmonised.
Leadership and commitment — Annex SL identical.
Actions to address risks and opportunities — BCMS focuses on disruption risk, 27001 on information security risk; conceptually aligned.
Business impact analysis and risk assessment — A.5.30 ICT readiness for business continuity operationalises BIA on ICT side.
Business continuity strategies and solutions — A.5.29 information security during disruption is the ISO 27001 anchor.
Business continuity plans and procedures — direct link to A.5.29.
Incident response structure — overlaps with A.5.24 incident planning and preparation.
Warning and communication — backup and recovery capability supports communications infrastructure during disruption; A.5.14 information transfer is joint anchor.
Business continuity plans — direct 1:1 mapping to A.5.29 detailed plan requirement.
Exercise programme — ISO 27001 A.5.29 explicitly requires planning and exercising of ISMS disruption response.
Evaluation of business continuity documentation and capabilities — Clause 9.1 measurement umbrella in 27001.
Monitoring, measurement, analysis, evaluation — Annex SL identical.
Internal audit — Annex SL identical.
Management review — Annex SL identical.
Nonconformity and corrective action — Annex SL identical.
Continual improvement — Annex SL identical.
Recovery — A.8.14 redundancy of processing facilities.
Recovery relies on A.8.13 backup as technical baseline.
